_meta.description: Experience snippet store for RAG-driven CV tailoring. Each snippet is a self-contained, retrievable chunk of one role-experience theme. `text` holds the canonical phrasing; `variants` preserve alternative framings observed across reference CVs. The retriever should embed `text` + `variants` and select the framing that best matches the target job description.

schema.theme: high-level theme tag for filtering / clustering
schema.framing: audience the variant targets (commercial | data-engineer | data-scientist | physics-research | strategy)
schema.skills: concrete skills, tools, methods — primary retrieval signal alongside text
schema.text: canonical phrasing (default bullet for this snippet)
schema.variants: alternative phrasings from other CVs; embed each so retrieval can pick by job-description tone
schema.render_hint: where this snippet belongs in the rendered profile.json (e.g. experience[].bullets, skills[])

prime_appliances.context: Nationwide e-commerce scale-up. Owns data governance, LLM-enabled automation, and data pipelines across Shopify, supplier feeds, marketplaces, and fulfilment partners.

phd_researcher.context: £1m multi-institution research programme. Two distinct framings appear across reference CVs: (a) Python analytics / data-governance / stakeholder leadership transferable to industry; (b) deep semiconductor research — III-V epitaxy, MBE-grown InAs/InP quantum dot lasers for 1.55 µm telecoms, with cleanroom fabrication and device characterisation. Use (b) only for physics/engineering roles.

snippets.text: Designed and built production-grade data pipelines integrating product, inventory, order, and fulfilment data between Shopify and additional marketplaces, resulting in ~12% revenue growth.

variants.text: Increased monthly revenue by 12% by implementing automated, bidirectional synchronisation of product, inventory, order, and fulfilment data across multiple sales platforms and suppliers.
Led the design, governance, and operations of scalable data integration systems driving the company's transition to a nationwide e-commerce model.
Owned the end-to-end data product lifecycle for an eCommerce platform, determining strategy and delivering capabilities iteratively across pricing and analytics.

snippets.text: Deployed AWS Lambdas to perform ETL of supplier inventory feeds, synchronise Shopify stock levels, and store historical S3 snapshots for time-series modelling, resulting in a 100% reduction in accidental orders of products which were out of stock within supplier warehouses.

variants.text: Deployed serverless AWS Lambda pipelines to ingest and validate supplier inventory, synchronise Shopify stock, and store historical S3 snapshots for time-series demand modelling.
Deployed cloud-based AWS Lambda and S3 pipelines to deliver scalable and performant data infrastructure supporting nationwide commercial growth.

metrics: Reduced out-of-stock order error rate to 0%

snippets.text: Developed LLM-powered automation workflows using OpenAI API, including programmatic data validation and AI-generated product content from structured attributes and image vision analysis.

variants.text: Developed and deployed LLM-enabled automation workflows with OpenAI API, including programmatic product data validation and generation of SEO-aligned product titles, descriptions, and metadata from structured attributes and image vision analysis.

Designed and delivered LLM-powered data products using the OpenAI API, including automated data validation pipelines and AI-generated content derived from structured attributes and image vision analysis.

metrics: Reduced friction in data validation and normalisation

snippets.text: Established data governance and taxonomy frameworks through Shopify's metafield framework to support nationwide scale-up in a retail environment.

variants.text: Built and owned data quality, governance, and taxonomy frameworks to ensure reliability, consistency, and trust across integrated data sources spanning suppliers, marketplaces, and fulfilment partners.

snippets.text: Led agile delivery workflows between the business and logistics/inventory stakeholders, managing a capability roadmap and iterating features based on operational feedback.

variants.text: Led agile delivery workflows cross-functionally between business and technical stakeholders, translating operational requirements into structured data product features.

snippets.text: Built reproducible Python analytics pipelines (pandas, NumPy, SciPy, matplotlib) for data ingestion, cleaning, transformation, model fitting, and visualisation across a £1m multi-institution research programme.

variants.text: Built reproducible Python analytics pipelines (pandas, NumPy, SciPy, matplotlib) for data ingestion, cleaning, model fitting, feature extraction, and visualisation, improving reliability and standardising analysis outputs across the research group.
Built Python analytics pipelines (pandas, NumPy, SciPy) for data ingestion, transformation, modelling, and reporting, defining data quality standards across the research group.

snippets.text: Designed and analysed large experimental datasets, applying statistical modelling and multivariate regression to identify performance drivers.

variants.text: Designed and analysed large experimental studies, applying statistical modelling and multivariate regression to quantify performance drivers and identify optimisation opportunities.

snippets.text: Led data-driven research across academic and industry partners within a £1m multi-institution research programme, translating experimental results into actionable project direction.

variants.text: Owned experimental roadmaps and strategic direction within a £1m multi-institution research programme, aligning senior academic and industry stakeholders around shared data-driven outcomes.

snippets.text: Originated and managed external research partnerships while conducting technical due diligence.

Communicated quantitative findings through peer-reviewed publications, technical reports, and conference presentations, demonstrating the ability to surface insights from complex data clearly and credibly.

variants.text: Communicated findings with quantitative evidence through peer-reviewed publications, technical reports, and academic conference presentations, shaping research directions across collaborators.

snippets.theme: academic publishing / peer review ecosystem familiarity
snippets.text: Conducted research within the academic publishing and peer review ecosystem, co-author of 10 peer-reviewed articles, giving firsthand understanding of how researchers generate, validate, and disseminate knowledge.

Five (four) years' experience in ISO Class 6 (5) cleanrooms (ISO-14644). Skilled in end-to-end process optimisation for III-V optoelectronic devices, including mask design, UV lithography (direct-write and e-beam), ICP-RIE/RIE dry etching, selective wet etching, dielectric deposition/passivation, thin-film sputtering/evaporation, lift-off metallisation, wafer thinning, and device characterisation (L-I-V, OSA).

snippets.theme: III-V epitaxy / molecular beam epitaxy (MBE) / quantum dot lasers
snippets.text: Ph.D. focused on advancing molecular beam epitaxy (MBE) growth of C-band InAs/InP (001) quantum dot laser structures. Strong knowledge of III-V materials design principles transferable to other device heterostructure architectures; experienced with effusion-cell calibration, As2-based growth, and epitaxial interface control.

snippets.theme: process control / DOE / semiconductor data workflows
snippets.text: Experienced in Python-based statistical process control (SPC), design-of-experiments (DOE), and data-driven optimisation workflows using NumPy/pandas/matplotlib; familiar with SEMI protocols and III-V safety standards.

Proficient with Lumerical (FDTD/MODE) CAD tools for optical, photonic, and epitaxial structure modelling; capable of integrating simulation–fabrication–characterisation feedback for rapid prototype iteration.
Specialised in the development of InAs/InP (001) quantum dot semiconductor laser materials for next-generation C- and L- telecommunications, achieving record improvements in device efficiency.
